channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rotten Furniture outside Flat 7 Edgecombe house, 21st March
item.description:
Furniture flytipped outside Flat 7 Edgecombe House. Has become a regular spot for flytipping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lettsom Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on the approach to New Beckenham station, 21st March
item.description:
Large, deep pothole on the approach to New Beckenham station. Lennard Road side.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pavilion Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary lights stuck on red, 21st March
item.description:
Temporary traffic lights by Norman park were stuck on red.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 111, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 21st March
item.description:
The pathway that is in between the pound shop and the optician is always an area of massive fly tipping. People not only leave their rubbish but also furnitures. When I walk through that road I feel ashamed to be working in the area.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chase Side, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Denmark Hill SE5, junction with Champion Park. Flyposting on cabinet., 21st March
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Champion Park, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Car, 21st March
item.description:
No MOT on car, it has been abandoned (4 flat tires and a broken tail light). It is illegal to park a car without a valid MOT on a public road in the UK. So please don't close this ticket down and say "No further action". Remove or otherwise I will go high in Bexley Council.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pelham Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Piles of leaves, 21st March
item.description:
These leaves have been left for months despite being previously reported

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterdale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unsightly clothes disposal/collection bin on high street, 20th March
item.description:
Please arrange for the urgent removal of the bright yellow clothing disposal/collection bin across the road from Bounds Green underground station as its appearance is an unpleasant eyesore that adversely/negatively affects the local streetscape. It is attracting graffiti and encouraging the dumping of clothing on the ground, further exacerbating the issue. This/a High Road is not a suitable location for this unit, and its presence is both unsightly and detrimental to the overall environment.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48-50, Bounds Green Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inappropriate language, 20th March
item.description:
Bus stop signage in need of curing of inappropriate language daubed on it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 295, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
